data.title: Air Canada broadens winter network - adds Quito, year-round Manchester/Copenhagen service, and Calgary-Mexico routes.
data.description: In a recent announcement, Air Canada revealed its strategic expansion of the winter network in 2026. The expansion includes significant updates such as the addition of Quito to its network, year-round services to Manchester and Copenhagen, as well as the introduction of two sun destinations from Calgary. Additionally, the airline has increased its winter services to Latin American destinations. These developments come after Air Canada's previous announcement this month regarding the exclusive launch of non-stop flights from North America to Sapporo. Overall, this winter, travelers can expect more options and convenience with Air Canada's expanded network.

data.title: CytoMed Therapeutics (NASDAQ: GDTC) denies false claims, reaffirms progress in cancer treatment research in Singapore.
data.description: Singapore-based CytoMed Therapeutics Limited (NASDAQ: GDTC) is a clinical stage biopharmaceutical company that specializes in developing affordable donor-derived cell-based immunotherapies for various cancers. The company released a statement in response to recent false claims about its research programs, clinical advancements, and overall operations. This initiative aims to clarify misinformation circulating about CytoMed's work in advancing treatments for a wide spectrum of cancers, encompassing both blood-related and solid tumors.

data.title: Extraordinary General Meeting of LITGRID AB (Legal entity code 302564383) convened with approved agenda and draft decision.
data.description: The Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders of LITGRID AB has been convened based on the decision of the Board on January 28, 2026. The Company's legal entity code is 302564383, with a registered office at Karlo Gustavo Emilio Manerheimo st. 8, LT-05131, Vilnius. The meeting will address the agenda and draft decision approved by the Board.

data.title: Proteins & Protein Crystals Market to reach $960.37 billion by 2030, growing at 9.5% CAGR from $609.51 billion in 2025.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, the Proteins & Protein Crystals Market is anticipated to see significant growth, with projections indicating a rise from approximately USD 609.51 billion in 2025 to USD 960.37 billion by 2030. This reflects a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 9.5%. The market data comprises 286 tables and 67 figures for thorough analysis and understanding of the market trends.

data.title: Terraformation focuses on native reforestation with local approach as climate crisis accelerates in 2025.
data.description: In Kailua-Kona, Hawaiʻi, as of January 28, 2026, it has been reported that in the year 2025, there were record-breaking temperatures and an increase in climate-related disasters, highlighting the rapid acceleration of the climate crisis. This surge in environmental challenges is outpacing the implementation of effective solutions. Additionally, biodiversity loss and the degradation of ecosystems are exacerbating these risks.

data.title: Divi Aruba Phoenix Beach Resort undergoes complete refresh, shining brighter in Palm Beach, Aruba. Transformation landmark resort.
data.description: In Aruba's Oranjestad, on January 28, 2026, the Phoenix at Palm Beach is now shining brighter than ever, signifying the revitalization of the renowned Divi Aruba Phoenix Beach Resort. This iconic resort stands as a landmark on the island and has undergone a remarkable transformation.

data.title: AVAX price aims for $15.50-$16.50 mid-Feb, currently at $12.07. Analysts foresee 28-37% potential upside in 2-3 weeks.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Avalanche (AVAX) is currently priced at $12.07 per unit. Analysts anticipate a potential increase of 28-37%, reaching a range of $15.50-$16.50 in the next 2-3 weeks. Despite showing neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) and bearish Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) momentum signals, the projected upside remains significant.
